prompt: Create src/domains/ui/ui_helpers.rs and add 'pub mod ui_helpers;' to src/domains/ui/mod.rs. This file provides shared JRPG UI components for a Bevy 0.15 pixel art RPG. Read src/domains/ui/app_state.rs first for AppState and resource types. Read src/shared/mod.rs for TownId, ShopId, NpcId, DjinnId, EquipmentId, MapNodeId types — import them, never redefine. Create these items: (1) Color constants: BG_COLOR=#0a0a1a, PANEL_BG=#1a1a2e at 0.95 alpha, BORDER_COLOR=#cc8844, TEXT_COLOR=#e8d5b7, TEXT_DIM=#888888, HIGHLIGHT=#ffcc66, GOLD_COLOR=#ffd700. (2) ScreenEntity marker Component for despawn-on-exit. (3) MenuButton Component with a ButtonAction field. (4) ButtonAction enum with variants: NewGame, Continue, TravelTo(MapNodeId), EnterShop(ShopId), TalkToNpc(NpcId), CollectDjinn(DjinnId), BuyItem(EquipmentId), LeaveToMap, LeaveToTown. (5) spawn_panel() helper that creates a bordered Node with PANEL_BG and BORDER_COLOR. (6) spawn_button() helper that creates a Button with Text child inside a parent entity. (7) button_hover_system() that changes BackgroundColor on Interaction changes. (8) despawn_screen() system that despawns all ScreenEntity entities. Use Bevy 0.15 API: Node, Button, Text, TextFont, TextColor, BackgroundColor, BorderColor, Interaction. Run cargo check after. Commit: git add src/domains/ui/ui_helpers.rs src/domains/ui/mod.rs && git commit -m 'feat(ui): shared JRPG UI components'

Create src/domains/ui/title_screen.rs and add 'pub mod title_screen;' to src/domains/ui/mod.rs. Then register TitleScreenPlugin in src/domains/ui/plugin.rs by adding .add_plugins(title_screen::TitleScreenPlugin) and importing it. Read src/domains/ui/ui_helpers.rs for ScreenEntity, MenuButton, ButtonAction, spawn_button, despawn_screen, color constants. Read src/domains/ui/app_state.rs for AppState, GameStateRes, SaveDataRes. Read src/game_state.rs for GameState::new_game(). Read src/starter_data.rs for starter_map_nodes(). Read src/domains/world_map/mod.rs for load_map(). Create TitleScreenPlugin with: OnEnter(AppState::Title) spawns Camera2d + centered panel with 'VALE VILLAGE' title (64px, BORDER_COLOR) + New Game and Continue buttons. Update system handles button clicks: NewGame creates GameState::new_game(), inits world map with starter_map_nodes() + world_map::load_map(), inserts GameStateRes, transitions to AppState::WorldMap. Continue is placeholder (same as NewGame for now). OnExit uses despawn_screen. IMPORTANT: Insert GameStateRes via commands.insert_resource() in the button handler, not in plugin build — it requires user action first. Run cargo check. Commit: git add src/domains/ui/title_screen.rs src/domains/ui/mod.rs src/domains/ui/plugin.rs && git commit -m 'feat(ui): title screen with New Game / Continue'

Create src/domains/ui/world_map_screen.rs and add 'pub mod world_map_screen;' to src/domains/ui/mod.rs. Register WorldMapPlugin in plugin.rs. Read src/domains/ui/ui_helpers.rs for all helpers. Read src/domains/ui/app_state.rs for AppState, GameStateRes, CurrentTown. Read src/shared/mod.rs for MapNode (id, name, position:(f32,f32), node_type, connections), MapNodeType (Town/Dungeon/Landmark/Hidden), NodeUnlockState. Read src/domains/world_map/mod.rs for get_accessible_nodes(), can_travel(), get_node_type(). Read src/starter_data.rs for starter_map_nodes() to understand positions. Create WorldMapPlugin with: OnEnter(AppState::WorldMap) spawns camera + dark background + nodes as UI buttons positioned at (node.position.0 * 100.0 + 640.0, node.position.1 * 100.0 + 360.0) scaled to screen. Nodes colored by unlock state: hidden if Locked, gray if Visible, gold border if Unlocked, green if Completed. Show node name as text below each. Draw connection lines between connected nodes (use thin Node rectangles or just skip lines for now). Bottom bar shows gold amount. Update system handles TravelTo(MapNodeId) clicks: check world_map state, if Town node insert CurrentTown and transition to AppState::Town, if Dungeon show placeholder text. OnExit despawn_screen. Run cargo check. Commit.

Create src/domains/ui/town_screen.rs and add 'pub mod town_screen;' to src/domains/ui/mod.rs. Register TownScreenPlugin in plugin.rs. Read src/domains/ui/ui_helpers.rs, app_state.rs. Read src/shared/mod.rs for TownDef, NpcPlacement, ShopId, DjinnDiscoveryPoint. Read src/domains/town/mod.rs for get_npcs(), get_shops(), check_djinn_discovery(). Read src/starter_data.rs for starter_towns() to see TownDef structure. Create TownScreenPlugin: OnEnter(AppState::Town) reads CurrentTown resource, finds TownDef in starter_towns(), spawns panel with town name header + NPC list as buttons (TalkToNpc action — placeholder 'NPC says hello' popup for now) + Shop button (EnterShop action — inserts CurrentShop, transitions to AppState::Shop) + Djinn discovery if available + Leave button (LeaveToMap — transitions to WorldMap). OnExit despawn_screen + remove CurrentTown. Run cargo check. Commit.

Create src/domains/ui/shop_screen.rs and add 'pub mod shop_screen;' to src/domains/ui/mod.rs. Register ShopScreenPlugin in plugin.rs. Read src/domains/ui/ui_helpers.rs, app_state.rs. Read src/shared/mod.rs for ShopDef, ShopEntry, EquipmentDef, bounded_types::Gold. Read src/domains/shop/mod.rs for can_buy(), execute_buy() — these take ShopState, ShopId, EquipmentId, Gold. Read src/starter_data.rs for starter_shop_defs(). Create ShopScreenPlugin: OnEnter(AppState::Shop) reads CurrentShop, finds ShopDef in starter data, spawns two-column panel — left column lists items (name from equipment defs, price, stock) as BuyItem buttons, right column shows player gold from SaveDataRes. Update handles BuyItem clicks: check can_buy, call execute_buy, update gold in SaveDataRes, refresh display. Grayed out items if gold < price or stock == 0. Leave button transitions to AppState::Town. OnExit despawn_screen + remove CurrentShop. Use bounded Gold type — never bare u32. Run cargo check. Commit.
